---
title: "Monica Alexander"
toc: false
page-layout: full
body-classes: homepage
---

```{=html}
<div class="home-profile">
<img src="images/MonicaNewNew.jpg" class="home-avatar" alt="Monica Alexander">
<h1 class="home-name">Monica Alexander</h1>
<p class="home-subtitle">Associate Professor, Statistics and Sociology, University of Toronto</p>
<div class="home-links">
<a href="https://github.com/MJAlexander" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i></a>
<a href="https://bsky.app/profile/monjalexander.bsky.social" aria-label="Bluesky"><i class="fa-brands fa-bluesky"></i></a>
<a href="mailto:monica.alexander@utoronto.ca" aria-label="Email"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i></a>
</div>
</div>
```
